ocr.text: In the competitive landscape of North American logistics, on-time delivery performance is a critical metric that directly
influences customer satisfaction and operational efficiency. FedEx Corporation has consistently prioritized timely deliveries as
a cornerstone of its service offerings, recognizing that reliability is paramount in maintaining customer loyalty and enhancing its
market position. The data presented in the accompanying table provides a detailed overview of on-time delivery performance
metrics for FedEx in Canada and the USA, highlighting key performance indicators that are instrumental in assessing the

efficacy of our logistics operations.

Specifically, the table outlines the total number of deliveries made, which stands at an
impressive 150,000 for the Canadian market, showcasing our expansive reach and operational capacity. Furthermore, the on-
time delivery rate in Canada is reported at 92%, reflecting our commitment to meeting customer expectations and adhering to
delivery timelines.
DeliveryPerformanceMetrics  On-TimeDelivery
TotalShipments  Percentage  LateDeliveries
Q12024  AverageDeliveryTime  UnitsDelivered  TotalRevenue  CustomerComplaints
37,000  3.6Days  $195M  5,500  BranchLocations  650  TotalEmployees  10,000
OverallPerformance  Average  3.5Days  $295M  10,000  ServiceImprovements  5%  TargetsMet
This statistic not only demonstrates our operational excellence but also sets a benchmark for continuous improvement within

the organization. 

Additionally, the average delivery time of 3.5 days reinforces our strategic focus on efficiency, illustrating our
ability to deliver packages swiftly while maintaining high quality standards. The financial implications of these delivery metrics
are significant; with a total revenue impact of CAD 75 million linked to on-time deliveries, it is evident that our performance in

this area plays a pivotal role in the overall financial health of the organization. 

Moreover, the data indicates that we processed
approximately 12,000 urgent shipments, which underscores our capability to handle time-sensitive deliveries with precision. In
a rapidly evolving logistics environment, where consumer demands are ever-increasing, maintaining a high level of service is
essential for sustaining competitive advantage. The metrics provided in the table serve not only as a reflection of our current
performance but also as a guiding framework for future strategic initiatives aimed at enhancing our service delivery standards
across North America. As we move forward, it is imperative to leverage these insights to refine our operational processes and
ensure that we continue to meet and exceed the expectations of our customers in an increasingly demanding marketplace.
